title.en: You can imagine what a terrifying thing this is!

content.en:
According to the quest, the Shadowless Man is a primordial artifact with intelligence.

Under normal circumstances, the primordial antiquities have no wisdom, and their behaviors conform to certain laws, and there are few active behaviors.

But the shadowless people are different, this belongs to the mutant species among the primordial ancients, and it is said that there are strong people who caught the primordial ancients for research and fusion, and finally made up a mutated primordial antiquity.

Ye Tian didn't want to know the origin of the Shadowless Man, but the Shadowless Man was indeed a very terrifying primordial artifact, he could transform into any Dao Ancestor, and he could also obtain the memory and Dao of that Dao Ancestor, so that other Dao Ancestors could not identify it.

And if the Shadowless Man wants to transform into a Dao Ancestor, he must kill that Dao Ancestor and then devour it.

There are more and more Dao Ancestors devoured by the Shadowless People, and their strength will become stronger and stronger.

Because it is an original antiquity, the Shadowless Man will continue to devour one Dao Ancestor after another according to this law, and his identity will also change again and again.

You can imagine what a terrifying thing this is!

If there are a lot of shadowless people, then it will be a great calamity!

Fortunately, shadowless people are too rare, so the impact is not too great.

Now, the Nine-Story Building has locked a shadowless person in a certain regional boundary, and it has also specifically locked the interior of a certain residential boundary, so the scope has suddenly decreased a lot.

But that community realm also has a lot of Dao Ancestors, about tens of thousands, including many Sevenfold Dao Ancestors.

If the Nine-Story Building sent an Eightfold Dao Ancestor or a Nine-Fold Dao Ancestor, there would also be a way to find that shadowless man.

But this time, this was released as a mission, and the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor was asked to find the Shadowless Man.

For the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, this task was not only difficult, but also dangerous.

Because the strength of the Shadowless Man is not weak, once the Shadowless Man attacks the Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor, then the Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor will almost certainly die.

Of course, you can refine a clone to find it, but the clone you refine is very weak, and there are not many means, so it is definitely far inferior to the ontology.

In addition, if the shadowless man is not actively exposed, it is extremely difficult to find him.

At present, there are only two ways to find the Shadowless Man, the first way is to directly blast the body of the Dao Ancestor, and at the moment when the Dao Ancestor's body collapses, he can sense the breath of the primordial antiquity, so that it is confirmed to be the Shadowless Man;

However, these two methods can't be promoted, which Dao Ancestor is willing to let others test like this?

Among the tens of thousands of Dao Ancestors, there are many Sevenfold Dao Ancestors and Half-Step Eightfold Origin Ancestors.

Therefore, the half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Nine-Story Building could not let these Dao Ancestors cooperate one by one at all.

Therefore, both options are negligible.

"There shouldn't be many half-step sevenfold ancestors who have taken on this task!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Kunhe District Boundary, Yanghe Community Boundary.

Ye Tian passed through the transfer of the nine-story building, and came directly to the Kunhe Xuanlou, and then came here from the Kunhe Xuanlou.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the Yanghe Community Boundary, and he was discovered by those half-step Eightfold Ancestors in the Yanghe Community Boundary for the first time.

After all, during this period of time, Ye Tian was not the only member of the Nine-Story Building who had entered the Yanghe Community Realm, although they didn't know what was going on, they also knew that it was related to the Nine-Story Building.

"Another half-step sevenfold ancestor has come in, and the breath of life is very strong, it should also be a member of the Nine-Story Building, what are they looking for? Could it be that we have found an incomparably precious treasure in this community realm?"

A half-step eightfold ancestor in the Yanghe community thought to himself.

However, he didn't ask Ye Tian.

After all, he didn't dare to offend the Ninth Building, even if it was an ordinary member of the Yellow Building, he didn't dare to offend!

......

"No matter how deep the shadowless man is hidden, he is also a primordial antiquity, he has talent, and he will still be detected by my copying talent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After finding the shadowless man, he directly chooses to submit the task, and a strong person will directly lock the shadowless man's location to confirm whether the task is completed.

If you make a mistake, the mission will fail.

This kind of mission has only one chance.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's copying talent continued to explore the boundaries of the Yanghe community, and soon locked the location of the shadowless man.

"Found it, it's easy!"

Immediately, Ye Tian reported to the nine-story building.

Immediately, the owner of the Kunhe Xuanlou of the Nine-Story Building confirmed whether Ye Tian's task was completed.

"Hey, this little guy really found the Shadowless Man!"

Kunshan Daozu, the owner of Kunhe Xuanlou, was a little surprised, and immediately grabbed it in the air, from the distant Kunhe Xuanlou, directly into the boundary of Yanghe Community, and arrested the shadowless man.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, mission accomplished!"

Kunshan Daozu announced.

As Ye Tian completed this task, his points increased by 600 points again.

If you add the points from the last time, Ye Tian has gained a total of 1100 points!

With so many points, it far surpasses the other half-step sevenfold ancestors who participated this time.

After all, Ye Tian's speed of completing the two tasks was too fast, it was like cheating.

It's just that other half-step sevenfold ancestors can only see their own points, and they can't see the points of other half-step sevenfold ancestors.

Therefore, they had no idea that someone had already reached 1100 points.

......

"1100 points, although it's a lot, but it's still not safe, anyway, there's still a lot of time, continue to take the task, and this time is also a good opportunity to get points, these points are the points that are really given to us, and there are many suitable tasks, if it is usual, many tasks have long been snatched away by the sevenfold ancestor and the eightfold ancestor, and it is not our turn to be a half-step sevenfold ancestor!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took one task after another, some of which were not very difficult, but he didn't get many points.

As for the tasks that suited him, he didn't see them, and most of them were difficult and time-wasting.

As the years passed, one task after another was completed by these half-step sevenfold ancestors of the Nine-Story Building, and the tasks were naturally becoming fewer and fewer, and the rest were almost all tasks that could not be completed, or tasks that were not worth taking.

"3890 points!"

Ye Tian looked at his points, and he didn't know if this number of points could rank in the top thirty-six, but if he thought about it carefully, he should be able to!

Finally, the time has come!

A half-step sevenfold ancestor returned to his branch.

Ye Tian also returned to the Hanhai Yellow Building, waiting for the points ranking to be announced.

For this point ranking, the owner of the Hanhai Yellow Building, the Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor, is also paying attention.

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor is a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, so he still stays in the Hanhai Yellow Tower, if he breaks through to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, he will also go to the Xuanlou, where will he still serve as the owner of the Yellow Tower!

"Endless Dao Ancestor, do you think you are sure to enter the top thirty-six this time?"

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor asked.

"I don't know, the rankings are coming out soon, aren't they?"

Ye Tian smiled.

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor didn't speak, but he felt that Ye Tian had little hope, after all, he knew what Ye Tian's life level was, and he definitely didn't reach more than 8.

And among the nine-story buildings, I don't know how many half-step sevenfold ancestors are close to the 9 life level, and there are many half-step sevenfold ancestors whose strength surpasses Ye Tian, and there are also many half-step sevenfold ancestors whose knowledge and heritage surpass Ye Tian.

Therefore, he felt that Ye Tian did not have any advantages.

Of course, he can only think about this sentence in his heart, but he can't say it.

Although he is the owner of the Hanhai Yellow Building, and Ye Tian is only the deputy owner, maybe one day, Ye Tian will surpass him!

Therefore, there is no need to offend Ye Tian.

After a while, this time the points ranking was announced, and only the top 36 were announced, and they were announced by one digit.
